headline: Wild West Social House Brings Luxury Fashion Rental to the Desert with Square’s Most Dynamic Mobile POS
summary: DISTRIBUTED-WORKFORCE/OAKLAND, Calif., April 17, 2026--Wild West Social House, the Los Angeles-based luxury fashion rental and members' club, selected Square Handheld – Square's powerful, portable point-of-sale (POS) device – to power its first off-site activation, "The Wild West Stables," during the Coachella Valley’s renowned music festival. The collaboration brought Square’s award-winning, mobile terminal to one of retail's most demanding environments: a desert where connectivity is unpredict
